items.caption: An empty, abandoned warehouse with a concrete floor and a metal roof. the interior is spacious with high ceilings and exposed rafters. the walls are unfinished, and there are no visible signs of recent use or maintenance. the lighting is artificial, with several fluorescent lights mounted on the ceiling. the overall condition of the warehouse suggests it has been unused for some time, as evidenced by the dirt on the floor and the lack of any visible equipment or furniture.
